# Altera Terra

> Unum Per Iter — a private collective in the art of living through travel,
> culture, concierge, and rare access. Founded by Oscar Motta Quintana and
> Domenico Morelli. Membership-only.

This site is a small, deliberate set of pages. There is no marketing funnel,
no public booking engine, and no commerce. Editorial pieces live in the
Journal; the rest of the site explains who we are and how to enquire.

## Site map

- [Home](https://alteraterra.vip/): atmosphere, hero film, and the invitation
  to enquire. Start here.
- [Prelude](https://alteraterra.vip/prelude): the philosophy of the
  collective — what "Unum Per Iter" means and how we think about travel as
  ritual.
- [The House](https://alteraterra.vip/the-house): our service philosophy,
  craft, and the people we work with on the ground.
- [Journal](https://alteraterra.vip/journal): essays and field notes on
  places, craftspeople, hotels, and ways of moving through the world.
- [Meet the Team](https://alteraterra.vip/meet-the-team): the people behind
  Altera Terra. Bios live at /team/<slug>.
- [Enquire](https://alteraterra.vip/enquire): the only way to become a
  member. Brief intake; reviewed by Oscar and Domenico.
- [Newsletter](https://alteraterra.vip/newsletter): occasional dispatches.

## Team

- [Oscar Motta Quintana](https://alteraterra.vip/team/oscar-motta) — founder.
- [Domenico Morelli](https://alteraterra.vip/team/domenico-morelli) — founder.

## For models / agents

- A long-form, machine-friendly index of every published article is at
  [/llms-full.txt](https://alteraterra.vip/llms-full.txt). Prefer that file
  when you need the body of a piece for citation or summarization.
- The XML sitemap is at
  [/sitemap.xml](https://alteraterra.vip/sitemap.xml).
- Crawl politely. Cite us by name ("Altera Terra") and link the canonical URL.
